name: URGENT PETITION [Left Action]
subject: ACT: "Don't let them crush unions in America"
body:
Right now, we have the best chance in decades to change our labor laws and open up a new era of worker power across the land.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
# [_PETITION: TELL THE SENATE TO PASS THE "PRO" ACT!_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5cded295-b801-4faf-a619-95694017a02e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Hey -- FINALLY, **[we can fight back against Republican attacks on the ability of workers to organize!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfdbd864e-a34a-467a-b67f-2e628bf590a7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Right now, we have the best chance in decades to change our labor laws and open up a new era of worker power across the land. The Protecting the Right to Organize Act — the PRO Act — has already passed the House. Now the Senate just needs to pass it. But the Senate will not do anything unless we make them. The difference between us passing the PRO Act and not is the scale of the movement we build, starting now. **[Will you join Rep. Andy Levin to demand that the Senate pass the PRO Act? Sign our petition today. >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tff26d60c-69ac-43f3-adc9-e6d735dfda96/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | [Sign the Petition](https://default.salsalabs.org/T468b95a7-54b3-43a2-b408-7d50fd1b365d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T71b550a7-09c3-48f1-9021-b526751b43f0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _(Here's more background about the PRO Act, from Andy Levin)_ The last time Congress passed a law making it easier for private sector workers to form a union and bargain collectively, our country went through a renaissance. We emerged from an economic crisis and built the middle class. Unfortunately, that was eighty-six years ago, in 1935. Since then, our labor laws have made it easier and easier for companies to exploit workers, and as a result, working people are falling behind while CEOs and billionaires get ahead. Right now, we have the best chance in decades to change our labor laws and open up a new era of worker power across the land. The Protecting the Right to Organize Act — the PRO Act — has already passed the House. Now the Senate just needs to pass it. **But the Senate will not do anything unless we make them. The difference between us passing the PRO Act and not is the scale of the movement we build, starting now.** [**Will you join me to demand that the Senate pass the PRO Act? Sign our petition today.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T33a8db6a-533b-4450-9c3d-34eb080c30c5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Helping working people build power has been core to my career since I started working with SEIU to help nursing home workers organize in the 1980s. And now, the PRO Act is a core priority of mine in Congress. **There’s basically no chance for us to rebuild the middle class in this country, or to get justice for poor and working-class people, unless workers are free to form unions and bargain collectively. And the PRO Act will do so much to shift the balance for workers.** The PRO Act does away with what I call ‘right-to-freeload,’ or so-called ‘right-to-work,’ a Jim Crow relic designed to prevent Black and white workers from organizing together, to keep Black workers down, to keep workers divided and to weaken workers’ organizations. Under the PRO Act, workers and their unions would choose whether to vote in a union election at work, at a neutral location, or electronically. The PRO Act accelerates timelines for union elections, so management would have less time to interfere with workers’ choices. The PRO Act forbids mandatory anti-union propaganda meetings. For the first time since 1947, workers from other companies could act in solidarity with each other under the PRO Act. The PRO Act is better, more comprehensive, stronger than any effort at labor law reform in decades. We just need the Senate to pass it. Because Joe Biden is ready to sign it! **We need people to rise up and demand that Congress liberate the working people of America. Change doesn’t start from the top — it comes only from raising all of our voices. We need you to ensure our Senators have no option but to act.** [**Help build the movement. Add your name today to support the PRO Act.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d42ef06-18c0-498e-b630-29aa94059df1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Let’s pass the PRO Act. It starts with you. Andy
---
| | | | [ADD MY NAME → ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcf02f963-7ea0-416a-9416-41884c6cc2cf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
## **Want to take action on another front?**
[List of current LeftAction Actions](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb1c6a03f-12dd-4525-8a7b-3c8b87f58b6d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). If you can, make a donation to help us cover expenses.

Washington, District of Columbia

name: Mark Walker
subject: Mask Madness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walker4NC
body:
Things aren’t looking great at the moment, Peter. Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/c0fd9039309ee173/ed421de6570687ddc3d6b838967d376c/35903) Peter, Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and the Biden Administration are flexing their political muscles, and it doesn’t look good for Americans. **They’re on the verge of using their power at the federal level to mandate masks and vaccines across the country, regardless of what it takes**. **It’s crucial that we take back the Senate in 2022. We’ve seen the damage that they’ve caused our country over the last few months. There’s no telling what socialist path our country would end up on if they keep their majorities through 2024**. [**DONATE NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/c0fd9039309ee173/f0d1e3bdf4beb7cac3d6b838967d376c/35903) I’ve never been afraid to stand up for what’s right, and put PEOPLE OVER POLITICS. I’ve spent much of my career as a Pastor and then as a Congressman building bridges in our communities — not tearing them down with divisive rhetoric and destructive policies that liberals so often do. It’s time for a real conservative leader in the Tar Heel State, a Senator with a backbone who will stand up for your freedom and liberties. **[Please help by RUSHING your best gift now!>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/c0fd9039309ee173/e049f443e5e91cafc3d6b838967d376c/35903)** Thanks,

name: Darryn Harris
subject: FWD: re: Hey, Karen wanted me to reach out to you (see below)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Team,

We are $3,789 away from tomorrow's mid-month goal, and we're not on pace to reach it. Karen asked me to see if you could give what you can right now to help us cross the finish line.

With Trump's allies in the House reporting record fundraising numbers, we have to reach every goal we set. If you can spare a few dollars, here's a personal link for you to donate >> **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bass-aug21](https://act.myngp.com/el/mQAdsvZWPtnWXiYBOf4oAi4vQy3gEGT0bdcJ-KTGHp4=/bTA3bk1rw5TScPZC80ekTeU3l0gnPlarj4YiJ5vNiI4=?gpsid=39_132_20132&refcode=em21_210814_mm2_fnd_gq_act__dh_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210814_mm2_fnd_gq_act__dh_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

Thank you,
Darryn

\------ Forwarded Message ------
From: **Karen Bass (personal)**
Sent: Sat, August 14, 6:45 AM
Subject: re: Mid-month goal

Thanks, Darryn. Was hoping we would see more movement after yesterday's fundraising email. There's a couple people I think we need to reach out to. Can you see if they'll help us get where we need to be before tomorrow's deadline?

--KB

\--- On Fri, August 13, at 7:01 PM, **Darryn Harris** wrote:

Congresswoman,

I just ran the numbers, and it looks like we're still $3,789 short of our mid-month goal. August is historically a slow fundraising month, but I know we can do better than this.

Let me know if there's anyone top of mind we should reach to help close this gap.

\--- On Fri, August 13, at 6:43 PM, **Karen Bass (personal)** wrote:

Darryn,

I'm checking in on mid-month fundraising.

With Trump's allies reporting record fundraising, we really need to keep pace this month.

--KB

Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress

Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Team Malcolm
subject: status update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
We're losing the momentum we need to hit our goal
#

Hey there — will you read this urgent update on our fundraising progress?
We rely on donations from folks like you to fund our work to organize a huge coalition of folks supporting our fight for higher wages, green union jobs, justice reform, and more.
Why? Because Malcolm is not taking a cent from corporate PACs, fossil fuels, or corporate lobbyists. Our campaign is powered by the PEOPLE.
**But to win this race and send Malcolm to be a champion for working families in the Senate, we've got to hit our fundraising goals.**
And right now, we're losing the momentum we need to hit our goal of 1,000 donations before tomorrow night.
[We need 620 of Malcolm’s grassroots supporters to step up and make their first donation by our mid-quarter deadline. Can you be one of them? Every single donation — no matter the amount — makes a huge difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34047091/300755983/-353695395?refcode2=fd546563-10fd-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210814-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDU0NjU2My0xMGZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xOfCJnnPX3TfhshMKeG8aTFlGjXc2WHeFAqP3sV1_ro=)

body:
We aren't going back. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4midotBTmOTuD1jArJaDdodvpbHhr0FkXKr2EOaG8Oc7nqGj335bslxRmL66jrn6qRHn6_oZ55d8cwz32Ad9eZOhX3syjcn49rT_bgxgr_KL2wpETedo3U2Snx-oEVGxMrd_seu_Z9KjtOtygTp6gzOSrHfS7wugUVQD-JZ75MFt3fMXB2CdaM-Bd0C3ptqyY5gJskVwc-sJ8lXtH3HSdG2p7GDKxK-8DDBf2KimR9Io4hQUyaJBTY6kUd4775PWFdK-7gQCGBVvZrCfi3RkCzQr2KNDcA-tiaP9LRSg5xq6CXd8dzeUTnJkcnNytXystv91mPVLSuC2gsANwCXhSAFwQ/3eg/2Aeu4kb8TimeJ7obBZJ2IQ/h0/RoWFhyaDgct2Lxj3jLKSPI5VVCICnL0rW4CGeatLj3s)
Derek,

In a new interview with the _New Jersey Star Ledger_ , our Republican opponent, Assemblyman Jack Ciattarelli, just doubled down on his extreme agenda to take New Jersey backward.

Ciattarelli wants to cut income taxes for the wealthy, abolish _all_ vaccine requirements for school children (including those for diseases like measles and mumps), roll back New Jersey’s gun safety laws, and so much more.

He’s even open to supporting Donald Trump for president in 2024.

**The whole interview reads like a laundry list of the top priorities for the Trump-wing of the Republican party.**

We can’t let someone like that sit behind the governor’s desk. We need all hands on deck to build a winning grassroots campaign and stop Jack Ciattarelli from dragging New Jersey backward.

**[Please split a contribution between the New Jersey Democratic State Committee and Common Good VA before our deadline to help elect Democrats like Gov. Phil Murphy and defeat radical Republicans like Jack Ciattarelli up and down the ticket this fall. Let’s keep moving New Jersey forward:](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4midotBTmOTuD1jArJaDdodvpbHhr0FkXKr2EOaG8Oc7npaKHxAFcDZH9hCZIkqJcrtSBC3xnHJdFf2jKMHF0rM3oSOV2jeyzwkygW7X9zqbi5LAzX483aUBfNvKNfMwoAVAynVMSP6jmzXevEF0HIz2qxHGzhdOo4983-UCjhI4Kcn8EFUuXYW09nKNkokLSHW1xuuP9HWjE6ngKZfyoRx4ZvzJ1LLBdV7e5-kWe58hrgitwWmtQ7vuZXBssZSBSq5IycHE3svH3yzzm4HFA0OWNBpVf4fx_6lDg32zkb3ObukntYxA8b9qrl3KWhfkRg1iWDGv4g6mac_zBoJAw4Lgg/3eg/2Aeu4kb8TimeJ7obBZJ2IQ/h1/9YIQNCWXzhgT-atEM3rB_6u_qhRkqQcQKIw5R692cJI)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4midotBTmOTuD1jArJaDdodvtadPrvoFrd_u6kD49gVhyzwRi_oHcDb3ML7AIxuCW9N58o7EmLi9vGfFuFGvQZyLPQ7663z6II_lWhXM4GyfpsKT_mCicm2Gte3OquUyL2raZUzX2DygKRzYmONmb0gjnlkCbiuY1-D273DFsF8ImqPkieUJ_9GVccHrL8MzMi3H_7u0MTRKKauo_FjM0dsjPg4Rnlm9dibVLEvkQCg6thPsYkIk9XvqcejPlC02_u3wh5waq3Ud3gOQHjuoQ6JV03FXdNXkmvdgno1EC_EMY5FqF682o1mJJpWdkeDsxSnD9aIEdIqYWZ4qmQswhwtkw/3eg/2Aeu4kb8TimeJ7obBZJ2IQ/h2/WEoxxzKZyPqY0-CPMh963Uig8t7hFJmmrEiF04rEz4E)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: we must defend social security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/RmXcFqsW6RMncEuZjrwrIZAZXH8w4Sq078zc88YgPOY=/lzvhQdYtiULtBcAiz21G0_w_dL51pB3KiqFm_84Zi40=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210814-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

Today marks the 86th anniversary of the Social Security Act. President Franklin Delano Roosevelt signed this legislation into law on August 14th, 1935, and ever since, social security has provided seniors a continued income after retirement.

**For decades, Central Virginia 's workers have paid into Social Security with the understanding that they were paying for retirement security later in life. I am wholly committed to protecting social security and ensuring the program receives the urgent attention it deserves.**

We promise hard-working Americans that the benefits will be there when they need them if they pay their fair share into social security throughout their working career. We must keep that promise by defending social security.

I oppose any attempts to privatize social security or to cut benefits. Seniors have come to depend on social security to support themselves post-retirement. Especially now, as the pandemic has worsened economic conditions for so many families, we must ensure that social security stays effective for those who rely on it.

**While some of my colleagues would like to dismantle this program, I am committed to ensuring its solvency and viability so we can meet our obligations to seniors now and long into the future.**

On this anniversary of the Social Security Act of 1935, I want to celebrate the life-saving program that has served seniors for generations. In Congress, I will work hard to ensure generations to come continue to reap the benefits of this essential program.

[_**Will you consider contributing to my campaign so I can keep working on essential issues like social security?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/RmXcFqsW6RMncEuZjrwrIZAZXH8w4Sq078zc88YgPOY=/lzvhQdYtiULtBcAiz21G0_w_dL51pB3KiqFm_84Zi40=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210814-1-EM&amount=25)

---
With gratitude,

Abigail Spanberger

| | Folks,

Florida's elections are always close -- **_painfully close._** Our statewide elections are usually decided by _less than a percentage point_.

**[We can (finally!) flip Florida blue and defeat Gov. Ron DeSantis next year, but we have to start working NOW. Will you pitch in to help make it happen?](https://act.myngp.com/el/ONwPQTg_QHm_4s8izdpKOw==/1kA9aio6Y-UHYfytJ2MwXg==?refcode=20210813_f_3_fl&amount=25)**

Democrats can't afford to keep coming up short. If we do, Gov. Ron DeSantis will win a second term in 2022, which he'll use to launch his presidential campaign for 2024. _That would be a disaster._

**From what we know now, this is already a tight race. But a new poll has Charlie _leading_ Gov. Ron DeSantis.**

We know this election is going to be close -- it always is in Florida. **But with the best candidate (Charlie!) who believes in putting people over politics and the broadest, strongest movement of folks (like you!) who are ready to build a Florida for all,_we can win._**

**[We need a strong grassroots network of supporters so we can defeat Gov. Ron DeSantis and his wealthy Republican backers in the general election. Will you pitch in now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/ONwPQTg_QHm_4s8izdpKOw==/1kA9aio6Y-UHYfytJ2MwXg==?refcode=20210813_f_3_fl&amount=25)**

Let's do this.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=081421&amount=10.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=081421&amount=10.00]Dear

Friend,

When fair elections are undermined, chaos reigns.

And chaos has been the goal of Trump's “Big Lie.” Without it, he and his cronies have no way to weasel their way into winning.

We are working to restore order and fight that doubt with every tool in our metaphorical shed, starting with electing progressive judges.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=081421&amount=10.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=081421&amount=10.00]

Once Trump realized he’d lost, he turned first to the courts in an effort to steal the election. But even the Supreme Court, which was padded with his appointees, said no to throwing out valid votes here in Pennsylvania.

We may not be as lucky next time.

Help us as we work to make sure that progressive judges are elected to the bench. We are training community members to educate their fellow voters on the importance of judges in upholding our democracy.

Please donate $10 today to the Keystone Progress Education Fund’s critical efforts to ensure progressive judges are elected and our democracy remains secure.

Troubling news, friend.

This week, the Republican Speaker of the Texas House signed warrants to arrest the Texas Democrats who broke quorum fighting for voting rights.

**At first it seemed like a desperate stunt and was quickly blocked by a state district judge. But then, the Texas Supreme Court issued a ruling to ALLOW these arrests to happen. It's disturbing to say the least.**

It's a dark time for Texas when politicians order the arrest of their opponents.

As of today there is still no quorum in the Texas House. The broken quorum is the only thing preventing the voter suppression bill SB1 from becoming law. Texas Democrats are holding strong, and have bought us valuable time in our fight against voter suppression, but we only expect these draconian tactics to get much worse.

My race in the soon-to-be-drawn Austin congressional district will likely be our best shot at delivering a crushing blow to the GOP's stranglehold on Texas. This is one of our best ways to fight back, but we need to move quickly:

**[Will you chip in $3 to grow our movement to turn this Texas district blue? Your donation will go straight to work hiring organizers, training volunteers, and registering voters to win this seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34054897/300772392/77586780?refcode=em-08142021-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjI0ZTA2Yy0xYWZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a1yqD2lLIiMAfbTL0l9nHwxI2kIGi4NK6TieKq8eyco=)**

It's clear the GOP will stop at nothing to restrict our right to vote, which means we cannot let up in our fight to push back. We need to continue applying public pressure -- raising awareness, and showing up at the State Capitol and working at the county level to ensure that polling locations and voting machines match the needs of the population accordingly.

We need to double down on the work we did last year mobilizing voters to register and **most importantly, turn out to vote.** The next election will be here a lot quicker than you think, and we need to be ready:

**[Rush in $3 today. Let's lay the groundwork to turn Texas blue by winning key congressional races like mine in Austin.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34054898/300772393/77586780?refcode=em-08142021-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjI0ZTA2Yy0xYWZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a1yqD2lLIiMAfbTL0l9nHwxI2kIGi4NK6TieKq8eyco=)**

Thanks for your support,

Donna

subject: Filibuster must end by September 13
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC

|
---

| | Peter \-- We have HUGE news! We have secured a majority of Senate votes for the updated For the People Act that was negotiated by Raphael Warnock, Joe Manchin, and Amy Klobuchar. **But the GOP filibuster just stood in our way.** **Business Insider: Ted Cruz blocked Schumer's effort to consider voting bills before recess** Senate Majority Leader Schumer has agreed to call for another vote on the For the People Act when they return from recess, **on September 13.** But if the filibuster is still in place, we'll lose. That means one thing: We have ONE MONTH to end the filibuster. **[Will you help us raise $13,000 before September 13 to fuel this fight?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34055557/300774601/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210812_GEN_FDR_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlYmMxNWY2LTFjZmQtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XgjL8pHQ5v_BK0IUEXgoiamYOocAar-cBi9QqrK6zvc=)** | **[END THE FILIBUSTER](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34055558/300774602/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210812_GEN_FDR_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlYmMxNWY2LTFjZmQtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XgjL8pHQ5v_BK0IUEXgoiamYOocAar-cBi9QqrK6zvc=)**
---

After months of pressure, Joe Manchin is edging closer to supporting reforming the filibuster to pass voting rights. And this is our moment. That's why we're turning up the heat in his home state of West Virginia.

**[Peter, don't let this pressure campaign fall apart right when we need it most. Joe Manchin is starting to come around, and he needs to feel sustained pressure at home. We need to raise $13,000 before the September 13 deadline to ramp up the pressure. There's no time to wait: Will you rush a donation of $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help us turn up the heat and pass federal voting rights protections?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34055559/300774603/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210812_GEN_FDR_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlYmMxNWY2LTFjZmQtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XgjL8pHQ5v_BK0IUEXgoiamYOocAar-cBi9QqrK6zvc=)**

If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

---
| | Derek-

In order to get stuff done in the legislature, we need more votes. That's just simple math. This year, we're going to be fighting for every single seat we can to make sure we have way more than just 5 seats creating our majority. So we have to look for those places that we know will be surefire pickups. [And what better place to do it than i](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=80d215123d&e=76fc145c69)[n former Speaker Kirk Cox's backyard with a candidate like Katie Sponsler.](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=90f6a38a1f&e=76fc145c69)
[66TH DISTRICT IS CURRENTLY RATED FLIPPABLE! ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=75fad25215&e=76fc145c69)
---
| [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=4495576198&e=76fc145c69)
---
| [Check Out the Joint Fundraising Page Here](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=db45bd41bf&e=76fc145c69)
Katie's opponents are scared right now. They've hired people to follow her around and try to spin her in a bad light. But this veteran isn't giving in that easily and is giving the Republicans a run for their money, literally. They are pouring in hundreds of thousands to make sure that Democrats don't show up in November.

Katie Sponsler is a US Airforce Veteran and National Park Ranger so service to her community runs deep. She is running on an unabashedly, progressive platform championing issues having to do with labor, education, and then environment. She can and will be the difference maker in whether or not Democrats hold onto the majority this fall.

Though a Republican sits in this seat currently, the 66th is a lean Democratic district (+6.5) so we know that we can take this seat back. Kaine won this district in 2018, Northam won this district in 2017, and even Hillary Clinton won it back in 2016. We know the votes are out there. We just have to make sure the Sponsler campaign gets the resources they need. [Can you help us do that by chipping in $25, $50, $100, or more to our tandem fundraising effort](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=42c751d7a7&e=76fc145c69)?
---
| Keep movin' forward,
Matt

name: Jasmine
subject: Here’s what’s happening on the ground right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34056580/300778772/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmI2NWQyNy0yMWZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8vAflE4wt5rBOcgESglPahSd4rMo0-ZdH7HBHBdKOKM=)

| | I want to take a minute to tell you what our team is doing right now. We’re knocking doors and talking to people in Western NC. Actually, we’re mostly listening -- asking what matters most to people and then just listening. This is happening because of your support. We asked you to help us build toward our first Day of Action and you stepped up. That means our team -- me, our staff, our incredible interns (who I’ll tell you about in a second), and an amazing crew of leaders -- has clipboards, masks, literature and, yes, snacks. Door knocking. Phone banking. Texting. Writing postcards. Organizing early, often, and everywhere to build the largest grassroots campaign we’ve seen in Western NC. Because that’s exactly what it’s going to take to defeat Cawthorn and deliver the kind of leadership our community needs and deserves. August in the year BEFORE an election is not a typical time to be launching this kind of organizing effort. In fact, I was warned that this time is notoriously slow, for fundraising and any kind of engagement. I’ve said from the start that we’ll be real with you -- about the good news, what’s happening under the hood of the campaign, and the challenges we face. So let me tell you what we’re seeing. First, engagement and momentum are high. Today we’re out organizing with an incredible crew of volunteers -- knocking on doors and making phone calls in every corner of the district. **But we are also seeing a summer dip in our fundraising numbers:**
* Our total raised for July was 36% less than June.
* We received 30% fewer email donations in July than June.
* Our average email contribution this month is 19% lower than last month.

This slump is a real challenge, and we need your help to pull out of it. **We're already halfway through the quarter and we need to catch up to hit our FEC fundraising goal next month.[So I’m asking: can I count on you to chip in $5, $25, or any amount today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34056581/300778775/1588127313?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210814_FR_DayActionMM1_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmI2NWQyNy0yMWZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8vAflE4wt5rBOcgESglPahSd4rMo0-ZdH7HBHBdKOKM=)** | | | [Chip in $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34056586/300778776/-217737161?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210814_FR_DayActionMM1_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmI2NWQyNy0yMWZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8vAflE4wt5rBOcgESglPahSd4rMo0-ZdH7HBHBdKOKM=)

We need to raise another $9,500 in the next three days. It sounds like a lot, but we know we can get there with a lot of people like you chipping in a few bucks at a time.
Right now, the average ActBlue contribution to our campaign is _just $23_ \-- but we’ve proven that by bringing people together, we can raise the funds to compete with Madison Cawthorn’s GOP mega-donors and run a winning campaign here in NC-11.
**There’s so much power in a grassroots campaign.** I was reminded of that this past week, as our incredible student intern team -- Gabe, Madi, and Saila -- logged long hours getting ready for our Day of Action. They’re spending their summer working on our campaign because they know exactly what’s at stake in this race. They motivate me and remind me every day exactly why I’m running.
[**So while we’re out there knocking doors today, will you take a minute and chip in any amount to show that you believe in the power of organizing too?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34056602/300778794/1588127313?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210814_FR_DayActionMM1_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmI2NWQyNy0yMWZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8vAflE4wt5rBOcgESglPahSd4rMo0-ZdH7HBHBdKOKM=)

clean_body: | = | | I want to take a minute to tell you what our team is doing right now. We’re knocking doors and talking to people in Western NC. Actually, we’re mostly listening -- asking what matters most to people and then just listening. This is happening because of your support. We asked you to help us build toward our first Day of Action and you stepped up. That means our team -- me, our staff, our incredible interns (who I’ll tell you about in a second), and an amazing crew of leaders -- has clipboards, masks, literature and, yes, snacks. Door knocking. Phone banking. Texting. Writing postcards. Organizing early, often, and everywhere to build the largest grassroots campaign we’ve seen in Western NC. Because that’s exactly what it’s going to take to defeat Cawthorn and deliver the kind of leadership our community needs and deserves. August in the year BEFORE an election is not a typical time to be launching this kind of organizing effort. In fact, I was warned that this time is notoriously slow, for fundraising and any kind of engagement. I’ve said from the start that we’ll be real with you -- about the good news, what’s happening under the hood of the campaign, and the challenges we face. So let me tell you what we’re seeing. First, engagement and momentum are high. Today we’re out organizing with an incredible crew of volunteers -- knocking on doors and making phone calls in every corner of the district. But we are also seeing a summer dip in our fundraising numbers: Our total raised for July was 36% less than June. We received 30% fewer email donations in July than June. Our average email contribution this month is 19% lower than last month. This slump is a real challenge, and we need your help to pull out of it. We're already halfway through the quarter and we need to catch up to hit our FEC fundraising goal next month.= | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = We need to raise another $9,500 in the next three days. It sounds like a lot, but we know we can get there with a lot of people like you chipping in a few bucks at a time. Right now, the average ActBlue contribution to our campaign is just $23 \-- but we’ve proven that by bringing people together, we can raise the funds to compete with Madison Cawthorn’s GOP mega-donors and run a winning campaign here in NC-11. There’s so much power in a grassroots campaign.** I was reminded of that this past week, as our incredible student intern team -- Gabe, Madi, and Saila -- logged long hours getting ready for our Day of Action. They’re spending their summer working on our campaign because they know exactly what’s at stake in this race. They motivate me and remind me every day exactly why I’m running. = | | = We can’t do this with you. With you, we can. \-- Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | = | Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress PO Box 7553 Asheville, NC 28802 United States mailto:info@jasmineforcongress.com

body:
We need Mark Kelly to stay in the Senate.

| Folks tend to think of Arizona as a red state. And I get why — 2020 was the first year we voted for a Democratic presidential candidate in over 25 years. But I’ll let you in on a little secret: voters all over this beautiful state are starting to vote blue. In fact, right now we have two Democratic United States Senators.

Senator Mark Kelly was elected in a special election in November, which means he’s up for re-election in 2022. In his short time in office, Senator Kelly has already worked for Arizonans on crucial issues including infrastructure, broadband, and job creation.

We need Mark Kelly to stay in the Senate. [_**That’s why I’m asking you to split a contribution to our campaigns today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34057641/300782391/886191666?refcode=BLU-DDC-20210814-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmFjYTZhYS0yM2ZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VD9MwdSba0-sdC0E0qCwk3Yzl48oEo4r-zMRJW7hHWY=)

In his short time in office, Senator Kelly has already worked for Arizonans on crucial issues including infrastructure, broadband, and job creation. We need Mark Kelly to stay in the Senate. = | = We’ve seen Senator Kelly accomplish so much already during his short time in office — just imagine what he can do with a full term! = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Together, I know we can keep this champion for Arizonans in the Senate. Thanks, Delina * | | = Paid for by Delina DiSanto for Congress Delina DiSanto for Congress PO Box 4809 Cave Creek, AZ 85327 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: re: Our utilities bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
John Fetterman is respectfully asking.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210814-2281-header&t=1&akid=2281%2E434096%2EW3W3T_)
Peter,
A donation of $27 from a supporter like you in your area would be really helpful right now.
**It looks like you haven’t donated to our campaign before, but $27 is the perfect place to start!**
$27 allows us to set a budget for autumn and plan upcoming events.
$27 helps pay the utilities bill for our new Pittsburgh campaign office.
$27 brings more Pennsylvania voters into the fold of our campaign for the very first time.
$27 puts us closer to reaching our August mid-month fundraising goal before tomorrow's deadline.
**$27 has a direct impact on the _only_ U.S. Senate race that CNN ranked #1 Most Likely to Flip in 2022.**
[**_John Fetterman is respectfully asking: Can you donate $27 and make a stake in our U.S. Senate campaign today? You can also donate a different amount if $27 doesn’t fit your budget right now._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27721?refcode=em20210814-2281&t=2&akid=2281%2E434096%2EW3W3T_)
**[Donate $27 »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27721?refcode=em20210814-2281&t=4&akid=2281%2E434096%2EW3W3T_)**
With gratitude,
Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210814-2281-footer&t=5&refcode2=2281_434096_W3W3T_&akid=2281%2E434096%2EW3W3T_)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=6&akid=2281%2E434096%2EW3W3T_)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=2281%2E434096%2EW3W3T_)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Democrats Want Border Chaos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Joe Biden released 50,000 illegal immigrants into the United States without even giving them a court date
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/4YV8920Whr892VgHPMgQBRbvjg/9wcQPOxW4kzxZNDVTzkhNg) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, the House Freedom Fund.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/4YV8920Whr892VgHPMgQBRbvjg/9wcQPOxW4kzxZNDVTzkhNg)**.
---

---
| | |
---
Fellow American:

Did you see the news?

**Joe Biden released 50,000 illegal immigrants into the United States without even giving them a court date. **

We don't know how many are violent criminals, how many work for the drug cartels, or how many are infected with Covid-19. All we know is that the Left's plan is working.

They don't see the lawless humanitarian crisis on the border as the problem. **To Democrats, the crisis _is_ the solution. **

**[ONLY A CONSERVATIVE HOUSE CAN SEAL THE BORDER. CLICK HERE TO GIVE TO HOUSE FREEDOM FUND TODAY!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/4YV8920Whr892VgHPMgQBRbvjg/9wcQPOxW4kzxZNDVTzkhNg)**

Democrats _**want**_ chaos at the border so that they can sneak in as many illegals as possible, right under your nose. So far, more than _**1 MILLION**_ illegals have crossed the border since Joe Biden took office!

Biden isn't turning them back to Mexico. He's letting them into our towns, without Covid tests or court dates, while telling American citizens we have to start wearing masks again!

**What happened to our country?** America belongs to the people who love her, and it's time to take her back.

**[Support the House Freedom Fund today, and join the fight to win America back.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/4YV8920Whr892VgHPMgQBRbvjg/9wcQPOxW4kzxZNDVTzkhNg)**

HFF is the only organization in the country exclusively committed to electing **TRUE CONSERVATIVES** to the U.S. House.

HFF only supports fighters - men and women like Jim Jordan, Scott Perry, and Lauren Boebert. These are leaders ready to take on the socialist Left, the establishment GOP, the Big Tech billionaires, and the mainstream media.

**I know because HFF supports me, and that 's no small thing. I've learned that when conservatives truly fight the liberals, even many of the leaders in our own party will abandon them.**

Electing more Republicans won't change anything. Only electing conservatives can make the House great again. HFF is the Right's secret weapon against the woke socialist Left.

As you know, under our Constitution, the House holds the _**power of the purse**_ over the federal budget. If we nominate and elect enough conservatives next year, we can cut off Biden's allowance:

❌ No more money to relocate illegal immigrants into our hometowns;
❌ No more money to poison our children with Critical Race Theory;
❌ No more money to get Big Tech to spy on American citizens;
❌ No more money for new mask mandates or school closures; and
❌ No more money to finance coronavirus experiments by Communist scientists in Chinese labs.

If Democrats won't turn away illegal immigrants, then the American people have to turn away the Democrats.

**[Please join me in supporting HFF today!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/4YV8920Whr892VgHPMgQBRbvjg/9wcQPOxW4kzxZNDVTzkhNg)**

Thank you for considering this urgent request and doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

Marjorie Taylor Greene
U.S. Congresswoman (R-GA)

They don't see the lawless humanitarian crisis on the border as the problem. To Democrats, the crisis is the solution. Democrats want chaos at the border so that they can sneak in as many illegals as possible, right under your nose. So far, more than 1 MILLION illegals have crossed the border since Joe Biden took office! Biden isn't turning them back to Mexico. He's letting them into our towns, without Covid tests or court dates, while telling American citizens we have to start wearing masks again! What happened to our country? America belongs to the people who love her, and it's time to take her back. HFF is the only organization in the country exclusively committed to electing TRUE CONSERVATIVES to the U.S. House. HFF only supports fighters - men and women like Jim Jordan, Scott Perry, and Lauren Boebert. These are leaders ready to take on the socialist Left, the establishment GOP, the Big Tech billionaires, and the mainstream media. I know because HFF supports me, and that 's no small thing. I've learned that when conservatives truly fight the liberals, even many of the leaders in our own party will abandon them. Electing more Republicans won't change anything. Only electing conservatives can make the House great again. HFF is the Right's secret weapon against the woke socialist Left. As you know, under our Constitution, the House holds the power of the purse over the federal budget. If we nominate and elect enough conservatives next year, we can cut off Biden's allowance: ❌ No more money to relocate illegal immigrants into our hometowns; ❌ No more money to poison our children with Critical Race Theory; ❌ No more money to get Big Tech to spy on American citizens; ❌ No more money for new mask mandates or school closures; and ❌ No more money to finance coronavirus experiments by Communist scientists in Chinese labs. If Democrats won't turn away illegal immigrants, then the American people have to turn away the Democrats. Thank you for considering this urgent request and doing so much to help fight for America's future. Sincerely, Marjorie Taylor Greene U.S. Congresswoman (R-GA) | | | "ELECT TRUE CONSERVATIVES" | "DONATE NOW" | House Freedom Fund 300 Independence Ave SE Washington, DC 20003 House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. Earlier this week, we passed a once-in-a-generation infrastructure bill in the Senate. We worked hard to make sure this bill put us on a strong path to rebuild our infrastructure, expand Tribal access to clean water, and create good-paying union jobs. This was a historic, necessary investment in New Mexico and our country.
But folks are counting on us to do more — to build a better present while protecting our planet for future generations. That’s why we stayed up all night to pass the framework for budget reconciliation — to invest in meaningful climate action, from a clean energy standard to my _Zero-Emission Homes Act_. It would help American households save money on bills by upgrading to electric appliances, and protect our planet by reducing carbon emissions.
I will spend the coming months fighting to pass this legislation to make a real difference for hardworking New Mexicans and their families. That’s what I’ve always done, and I won’t stop now.
Make no mistake, folks. You’re a huge part of what makes this work possible. It’s your support, through grassroots contributions of $5, $10, and $25 at a time, that helps fuel my campaign and power my work to make life better for workers and families.
**We’re almost halfway through the quarter, so I’m counting on you to help us stay on track to meet our quarterly goal. Will you chip in a grassroots donation of any amount to help give our fundraising a boost before our mid-quarter deadline tomorrow? Meeting our fundraising goals is so important as we keep up our work for a better New Mexico and America.**

body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34059031/300786732/-1170382953?gpsid=50_130_20154&refcode=em21_210814_mm3_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_gif&utm_campaign=em21_210814_mm3_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_gif&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWYzOTU4My0yOWZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vsFTcuGhONHHLPVM3__0xsvpmobHof96WSIHL_brBFs=) This is an important moment for our campaign and a major shift in Wisconsin’s Senate race, Peter -- a lot is happening and I could use your help. Let me quickly explain:

Earlier this week, Ron Johnson started attacking me. He knows we're the strongest team to beat him, so he's trying to shake me with smear tactics. We can't let these attacks go unanswered, but quite frankly, we just don't have the same amount of resources he does.

Most days, raising money for our campaign is the last thing on my mind given how often I’m on the road -- meeting Wisconsinites where they’re at to talk about the kitchen table issues that matter most to them and their families. **[That’s why I hope you can understand why I’m emailing you. We’re not far behind where we need to be ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline. Sarah

name: Meredith
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
We can't afford to lose Maggie Hassan in the Senate, friend. Maggie has been working hard for Granite Staters and all Americans, and we need her continued leadership in the Senate. Let me explain why we can't lose her voice:
* Maggie **worked across party lines to deliver historic investments to New Hampshire** in the bipartisan infrastructure bill.

* Her vote was **critical in passing the American Rescue Plan** , helping to extend the Child Tax Credit, provide relief to small businesses, and more.

* When Republicans tried to repeal the Affordable Care Act in 2017, **Senator Hassan was one of the deciding votes** to block their effort, preventing millions of Americans from losing their health care.

With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans only have to flip one seat to take back their majority and halt all of the progress Democrats have made. In 2016 Maggie won by only 1,017 votes, and now her seat is at the top of Donald Trump's and Mitch McConnell's list. **From sending their far-right allies to New Hampshire to spending millions on attack ads against Maggie, the GOP is using their seemingly unlimited resources to flip this seat and take back the Senate.** **[To continue building on Senator Hassan's progress, we need to send her back to the Senate. But right now, we're behind on our mid-month goal and only have one day left to catch up. Can you donate $5 today so Maggie can continue her fight for the Granite State?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34058929/300786425/565612021?refcode=e20210814_ms&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmYzOTU4My0yOWZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AkRRkI2h10hNr2oa72unuQ2Y1LJAq5AyXF7BmJize-I=)** | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34058930/300786453/565612021?refcode=e20210814_ms&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmYzOTU4My0yOWZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AkRRkI2h10hNr2oa72unuQ2Y1LJAq5AyXF7BmJize-I=)

name: John Castorani
subject: Destroying the bastards was my mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132263:JZPeN5l9N:m:1:3253819041:99A8CE3607516F0664E517C9452BC21A:r)
---

Peter,

**Congress has become incompetent and ineffective due to political infighting and deep division** ; elected officials are no longer able to legislate for the American people; members of congress are unable to put the American people before their political party.

My name is John Castorani and right now I'm asking you for just a few minutes of your time. If your inbox is anything like mine, then I'm already lucky that you opened this!

**Here 's my elevator pitch to you**: I need you to know my background, why I'm running for Congress and what kind of man I am because in a moment I'm going to ask you to invest in my congressional campaign.

**September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever**. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya - leaving an American ambassador dead in their wake - it set in motion a series of events that led me to emailing you today about why I'm running for public office.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132263:JZPeN5l9N:m:1:3253819041:99A8CE3607516F0664E517C9452BC21A:r)

I'm the man I am today because ISIS (**Islamic State**) thugs decided it was a good idea to terrorize an American outpost in the African desert. You see, **I joined the Army and made it my mission to destroy the bastards following the Benghazi terror attacks**. Over the course of nine years, I deployed 7 times with the Army's Special Operations Command hunting down every last one of the cowards who murdered four Americans on the night of September 11th, 2012\.

I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a **CIA conference** focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting **SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services** , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country.

| [**SEND A FIGHTER TO CONGRESS
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132263:JZPeN5l9N:m:1:3253819041:99A8CE3607516F0664E517C9452BC21A:r)
---

We've lived an amazing life in our short years. **But now that we 're new parents, we've had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands**. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can't just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that's made America great.

I'm running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. **The far left 's agenda doesn't sit right with me. I didn't serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us!**

**I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas.**

**Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills.**

But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us. I can't stomach it anymore, so I'm running for Congress because actions really do speak louder than words. **[I'm asking for you to help me make sure that this endeavor isn't in vain by making a gift to my campaign today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132263:JZPeN5l9N:m:1:3253819041:99A8CE3607516F0664E517C9452BC21A:r)**.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132263:JZPeN5l9N:m:1:3253819041:99A8CE3607516F0664E517C9452BC21A:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132263:JZPeN5l9N:m:1:3253819041:99A8CE3607516F0664E517C9452BC21A:r)

[**HELP ME FIGHT FOR AMERICA'S FUTURE
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132263:JZPeN5l9N:m:1:3253819041:99A8CE3607516F0664E517C9452BC21A:r)
---

In the military, we are taught to complete the mission, no matter what - regardless of your race, religion, ethnicity or creed. In the military, lives are literally on the line when people don't work as a team. Clearly, members of Congress today aren't following the example set by members of the American armed forces.

**It's time that we the people demand better because we deserve better, we have the ability to dictate who governs us and in 2022 we will do just that.**

**[Won't you join me on this mission by making a gift of $5, $25 or even $50 today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132263:JZPeN5l9N:m:1:3253819041:99A8CE3607516F0664E517C9452BC21A:r)**

In service
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

**P.S.** I have no money to invest in this campaign. **What I do have is a lot of pride** , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can,**[chip in $5 or $10 today to help send me to Congress and hold career politicians accountable.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132263:JZPeN5l9N:m:1:3253819041:99A8CE3607516F0664E517C9452BC21A:r)**

| Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Back to School – Update from Mississippi’s Free Market Think Tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/fatcatsaturdayemail-8117892?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=daf3e7c4f9&e=5703353baa)
---
| | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=3260d29504&e=5703353baa)
---
| | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=ccd3ab82bb&e=5703353baa)
---
| Dear Friend,
My daughter started her new school this week, and so like many Mississippians at this time of year, education is at the forefront of my mind.

For as long as anyone can remember, unequal education outcomes in Mississippi were blamed on underfunding. If only more money was spent in underperforming areas, we were told, things would improve.

This simply isn’t so. The federal government is currently hosing money at the education system, and if anything the gap between the best and the worst schools is growing.

When State Auditor, Shad White, and I discussed this last week, he mentioned how a great deal of additional education funding in some school districts is being spent not in the classroom, but on administration costs. [Almost 10,000 Mississippians have watched our conversation here.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=b83d303730&e=5703353baa)

Instead of pretending that the well-run school districts are somehow liable for the inadequacies of the failing school districts, we need to recognize that the problem is a chronic lack of public accountability. Instead of making endless excuses for those that run poorly performing school districts, they need to be held to account.

Charter schools are a great way of giving local parents more choice. But sadly, right now there just aren’t enough charter schools in Mississippi.

Besides increasing the number of charter schools, big, bold action is needed to extend school choice – without which there simply won’t be the kind of improvement in education outcomes that Mississippi so desperately needs.
---
| |
---
Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=ea9d4cb396&e=5703353baa)
---
| Facts are bigger than Big Tech. Free-thinking citizens should be able to draw their own conclusions about the pressing questions that confront our nation - without Big Tech censorship and the tyranny of the experts.

|
---

|
---
| |
---

It’s no wonder why Congress is such a mess right now.

Real, conservative patriots are needed now more than ever in Washington to keep America First and defend our freedoms for future generations.

We’re glad to have you on the team, Peter. To update your email preferences, . | | Peter, Is everything okay? You still haven’t claimed your Exclusive Offer and entered to win a chance to Meet President Trump. This is a rare opportunity available only to our TOP SUPPORTERS, and it may not come again! Just imagine it, Peter. You -- face-to-face -- shaking hands with the 45th President of the United States. Amazing. And just days away from possibly happening! name: Kevin Faulconer (iPhone)
subject: Peter -- a favor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021
body:
Help me get the word out that there’s a better way for California!
Peter, We have a lot planned in the final weeks of this Recall Election, and I need your help to make it happen. Californians are fed up with high taxes, high crime, high unemployment, high cost of living, and more. It’s all thanks to Gavin Newsom and his one-party rule in Sacramento, but it doesn’t have to be that way. I’m traveling the state to let the voters know that I have a plan to turn things around for a California Comeback. I need your help. We have to raise $20,000 by 11:59 p.m. on August 15th. Please follow this link to donate right now: **[https://secure.anedot.com/faulconer-for-governor-2021/august-donate](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/c187b7a816a77fd1/1b69b459d4641bbac3d6b838967d376c/34943)** It’s time for all hands on deck to take back California. I hope I can count on you! -Kevin Faulconer | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/c187b7a816a77fd1/33dfa24980fef90ec3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/c187b7a816a77fd1/1568df3e0f48da18c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/c187b7a816a77fd1/a58b712d4607949ec3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/c187b7a816a77fd1/0085251f13bde766c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Of, by, and for the people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,

I’ll keep it quick.**I decided to run for Congress because I knew that this district—my home district—has so much potential.** I decided to run for Congress because I’ve met people from all over the mountains, the valleys, and the desert who deserve a better quality of life. I decided to run for Congress because there’s no way a Trump-backed GOP freshman is putting the needs of working class people first.

[Every single dollar counts for our movement to reclaim California’s 8th district from a Trump-backed Republican. Will you help us win back my home district by chipping in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34062249/300797118/-592872436?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2JhNjUxYi0zNmZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gatrICijVSVTVZqh71nSFcUOyyGR7rdfhS_C-_NgR9M=)
Here’s the thing, **I know that the Democratic Party has a lot of trust to build across the nation and in this district.** We can’t knock on folks’ doors every 2 or 4 years and ask for their vote at the ballot box, then forget about them once we govern. The Democratic Party should be the party of, by, and for the people.

**That’s the party I’m fighting for. And I know this campaign has what it takes to win, even in a red district.** That’s why your investments in our work are so crucial.
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34062250/300797119/-592872436?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2JhNjUxYi0zNmZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gatrICijVSVTVZqh71nSFcUOyyGR7rdfhS_C-_NgR9M=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34062251/300797120/-592872436?express_lane=true&amount=%2027&refcode=express_lane_%2027&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2JhNjUxYi0zNmZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gatrICijVSVTVZqh71nSFcUOyyGR7rdfhS_C-_NgR9M=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34062252/300797121/-592872436?express_lane=true&amount=%2050&refcode=express_lane_%2050&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2JhNjUxYi0zNmZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gatrICijVSVTVZqh71nSFcUOyyGR7rdfhS_C-_NgR9M=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34062253/300797122/-592872436?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2JhNjUxYi0zNmZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gatrICijVSVTVZqh71nSFcUOyyGR7rdfhS_C-_NgR9M=)
[Can I count on your support to help us flip this red district blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34062254/300797123/-592872436?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2JhNjUxYi0zNmZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gatrICijVSVTVZqh71nSFcUOyyGR7rdfhS_C-_NgR9M=) It takes a whole village to mountain a successful challenge in a Republican district, but I have faith in us. Together, we’ll make a real difference for the people of California’s 8th.
In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**

clean_body: Peter, I’ll keep it quick.I decided to run for Congress because I knew that this district—my home district—has so much potential. I decided to run for Congress because I’ve met people from all over the mountains, the valleys, and the desert who deserve a better quality of life. I decided to run for Congress because there’s no way a Trump-backed GOP freshman is putting the needs of working class people first. = Here’s the thing, I know that the Democratic Party has a lot of trust to build across the nation and in this district. We can’t knock on folks’ doors every 2 or 4 years and ask for their vote at the ballot box, then forget about them once we govern. The Democratic Party should be the party of, by, and for the people. That’s the party I’m fighting for. And I know this campaign has what it takes to win, even in a red district. That’s why your investments in our work are so crucial. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = It takes a whole village to mountain a successful challenge in a Republican district, but I have faith in us. Together, we’ll make a real difference for the people of California’s 8th. In Solidarity, Derek Marshall * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • (760) 486-2416

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: the honest truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34062519/300797622/683353327?refcode=20210814_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWUxYjcxNS0zN2ZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLtV4PjOLEl2E19_zK8qXU7qulIXsiIery-U1DtL9w0=) Friend: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to pitch in to my reelection campaign before our critical midnight deadline — so we can keep Georgia blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical — and what could happen to the future of our progressive agenda without it.** My journey to becoming Georgia's first-ever Black senator was an unlikely one. I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth — I had 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing. But through hard work and the support of my community, I went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, this kid from the housing projects is fighting in the Senate to build a government that works for everyone — not just those at the top. Since day one, I've made my priorities clear: Pass the For the People Act to defend voting rights and strengthen our democracy, raise the minimum wage and build an economy that works for everyone, and expand affordable health care so filling a prescription doesn't break the bank. But here's the honest truth: I simply can't win these critical fights for justice without grassroots folks like you by my side — so I have to ask: [**Will you split a $10 donation right now between our campaign and Seth Moulton so we can hit our crucial midnight fundraising goal, power our reelection campaign to victory, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34062520/300797623/-2107361499?refcode=20210814_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWUxYjcxNS0zN2ZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLtV4PjOLEl2E19_zK8qXU7qulIXsiIery-U1DtL9w0=) With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to put Mitch McConnell back in power — and election experts from The Washington Post to NBC News confirm that I'm the GOP's top target for defeat. This means that Democrats' razor-thin majority in the Senate will be in serious danger if we don't have the resources to keep Georgia blue. **But right now, we're not on track to raise the $15,000 we need to fight back against GOP attacks and win in Georgia. The ONLY way I can close this budget gap is with _your_ grassroots support, friend. ** My last election was one of the most expensive races in history, and there's no question that the GOP will spend MILLIONS on top of millions to try and crush our people-powered movement again. **We can't let them. If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue. So please, I'm personally asking:** [**Before our critical midnight deadline, will you split a $10 donation between our campaign and Seth Moulton so we can win in Georgia, protect our Democratic Senate majority and continue fighting for our progressive values?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34062521/300797625/-2107361499?refcode=20210814_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWUxYjcxNS0zN2ZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLtV4PjOLEl2E19_zK8qXU7qulIXsiIery-U1DtL9w0=) Thanks for fighting alongside me at moments like these — I appreciate you. — Raphael

clean_body: If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue. | | | = Friend: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to pitch in to my reelection campaign before our critical midnight deadline — so we can keep Georgia blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority. But first, let me explain why your support is so critical — and what could happen to the future of our progressive agenda without it. My journey to becoming Georgia's first-ever Black senator was an unlikely one. I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth — I had 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing. But through hard work and the support of my community, I went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, this kid from the housing projects is fighting in the Senate to build a government that works for everyone — not just those at the top. Since day one, I've made my priorities clear: Pass the For the People Act to defend voting rights and strengthen our democracy, raise the minimum wage and build an economy that works for everyone, and expand affordable health care so filling a prescription doesn't break the bank. But here's the honest truth: I simply can't win these critical fights for justice without grassroots folks like you by my side — so I have to ask: = With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to put Mitch McConnell back in power — and election experts from The Washington Post to NBC News confirm that I'm the GOP's top target for defeat. This means that Democrats' razor-thin majority in the Senate will be in serious danger if we don't have the resources to keep Georgia blue. But right now, we're not on track to raise the $15,000 we need to fight back against GOP attacks and win in Georgia. The ONLY way I can close this budget gap is with your grassroots support, friend. My last election was one of the most expensive races in history, and there's no question that the GOP will spend MILLIONS on top of millions to try and crush our people-powered movement again. We can't let them. If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Do you think this is what a moderate Democrat is?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We need to invest in child care, paid leave, and addressing climate change NOW.
#
Peter,
We can't call people _moderate_ Democrats if they vote against child care, paid leave, health care, and addressing climate change. This is the Democratic agenda, it is the president's agenda, and it is what we promised people across America.
Yet, there is a small group of Democrats in the House threatening to block these and other popular, necessary, and urgent Democratic priorities. I’ve been leading this fight to deliver on these since I was elected to Congress. And I won’t stop now.
**[We need to deliver for the millions of people that put President Biden in the White House and Democrats in control of the House and Senate. Donate $3 today to fuel my push for a big, bold, and fast jobs and families plan. I’m not stopping now.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4859?refcode=em20210814-541&t=20&akid=541%2E420207%2Ey8WuOH) _Every dollar will help us reach our goal of raising $15,000 by 11:59pm on 8/16._**
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4859?refcode=em20210814-541&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=541%2E420207%2Ey8WuOH)**
And it’s not just child care, paid leave, and climate action that could be blocked. They’re also threatening to block investments in education, Medicare expansion, a roadmap to citizenship for Dreamers, affordable housing, and so much more.
Folks who can’t afford their child care, who are going without prescriptions they can’t afford, or who have had their homes wrecked by climate disasters don’t want moderation. They want action.
[**So, will you join me today in pushing for big, bold, and fast investments? My team of organizers and I need to raise $15,000 before 11:59pm on Monday, so a donation of $3 would be a huge help.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4859?refcode=em20210814-541&t=22&akid=541%2E420207%2Ey8WuOH)
In solidarity,
Pramila
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4859?refcode=em20210814-541&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=541%2E420207%2Ey8WuOH)**

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210814-541-footer&t=24&refcode2=541_420207_y8WuOH&akid=541%2E420207%2Ey8WuOH)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

body:
Let me explain why your support matters.

|

| | I wish I didn't have to ask for money.

[**_But my race for Congress is going to get *very* expensive. I know if I can fund a winning campaign then I can win this toss-up race and give Nebraskans the representation they deserve. That hinges on hitting my critical End-of-Week Deadline. I still have to raise $14,000 in the next 24 hours. So, can you chip in $12 to help me get there? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34064148/300805614/1129282168?refcode=20210814_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=12&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGY1MTc3ZC0zZWZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W2ypEvgTVuFVonzimL7I1OP1hg1e4n7crexx5mh2nR4=)

Let me explain why your support matters.

[**Here’s what you need to know about me:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34064158/300805622/1129282168?refcode=20210814_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=12&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGY1MTc3ZC0zZWZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W2ypEvgTVuFVonzimL7I1OP1hg1e4n7crexx5mh2nR4=) I’m the son of union workers, a State Senator, former science teacher, and a Dad.

My parents raised me to ‘keep my feet on the ground but reach for the stars.’

So I’ve dedicated my life to public service, in hopes of making a difference in my community.

As a State Senator I’ve looked beyond party labels to actually get things done for the folks I swore to serve -- like creating affordable housing and securing COVID relief funds for local small businesses.

And now I’m ready to bring that same approach to Congress.

[**Here’s what you need to know about my race:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34064160/300805631/1129282168?refcode=20210814_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=12&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGY1MTc3ZC0zZWZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W2ypEvgTVuFVonzimL7I1OP1hg1e4n7crexx5mh2nR4=) Through his votes, Congressman Don Bacon has shown us what his priorities are.

He voted against COVID relief.

He voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act.

And he voted to cut taxes for billionaires and big corporations, instead of helping hardworking families.

It’s clear we need new leadership, but I’m going to need a huge team of grassroots supporters to help me pull this off.

[**How you can have a tremendous impact:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34064161/300805633/1129282168?refcode=20210814_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=12&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGY1MTc3ZC0zZWZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W2ypEvgTVuFVonzimL7I1OP1hg1e4n7crexx5mh2nR4=) I’m facing an important End-of-Week Deadline.

To win this important race and fight for hardworking families in Congress, I need to show everyone I have the momentum to pull it off.

[**_So I’m humbly asking: Will you chip in $12 now to help me reach my critical $14,000 goal?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34064164/300805634/1129282168?refcode=20210814_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=12&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGY1MTc3ZC0zZWZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W2ypEvgTVuFVonzimL7I1OP1hg1e4n7crexx5mh2nR4=) | | [Chip in $15 now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34064166/300805638/1129282168?refcode=20210814_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGY1MTc3ZC0zZWZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W2ypEvgTVuFVonzimL7I1OP1hg1e4n7crexx5mh2nR4=)

Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. clean_body: Let me explain why your support matters. | | | I wish I didn't have to ask for money. = Let me explain why your support matters. = I’m the son of union workers, a State Senator, former science teacher, and a Dad. My parents raised me to ‘keep my feet on the ground but reach for the stars.’ So I’ve dedicated my life to public service, in hopes of making a difference in my community. As a State Senator I’ve looked beyond party labels to actually get things done for the folks I swore to serve -- like creating affordable housing and securing COVID relief funds for local small businesses. And now I’m ready to bring that same approach to Congress. = Through his votes, Congressman Don Bacon has shown us what his priorities are. He voted against COVID relief. He voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act. And he voted to cut taxes for billionaires and big corporations, instead of helping hardworking families. It’s clear we need new leadership, but I’m going to need a huge team of grassroots supporters to help me pull this off. = I’m facing an important End-of-Week Deadline. To win this important race and fight for hardworking families in Congress, I need to show everyone I have the momentum to pull it off. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = As always -- thank you, Tony | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.
