name: Nuestro PAC
subject: Can you imagine our growth translated into political power?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nuestro PAC
body:
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34064949/300807856/1999088365?refcopde=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRjMTgxMmFkLTQyZmQtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P-fGCzCfrOMIkuDWVHHbcKvq2hUNj-6GcKTezmU_Ne0=)

Friends -
The [2020 Census data](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34064950/300807857/-1097181002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRjMTgxMmFkLTQyZmQtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P-fGCzCfrOMIkuDWVHHbcKvq2hUNj-6GcKTezmU_Ne0=&emci=c4ac02e5-75fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4c1812ad-42fd-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7684583) that was just released shows that Latinos are the fastest-growing minority group in the United States.
Can you imagine that growth translated into political power? We can!
To achieve the political representation we deserve, we need to engage with Latinos across the country with bilingual communication campaigns in a culturally competent way.
We did so in 2020, and we can do it again in 2022 with your help. As a matter of fact, we plan to start right away.
Nuestro PAC is counting on your support to help us with our goal to mobilize, educate and turn out Latinos in critical states for the legislative and electoral fights ahead.

Last week, Rep. Cori Bush threatened me live on CNN. Now, I'm asking you to sign my petition to have her investigated by Congress When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=340818a52b894621b18168a84092fc11&_e=AgtlvEJ9hQZyL_HHNh0Ei8GWELKAk--n_9qRHrNNDrzxkxBT_SAH8BYKtLaP-rvooBvpcdZNuekSzBHh0ryriM2NA_ZcWk4zsc3OsFsPKRWjHpi-rwAn4HvzizLwjQhMUWmlQW26famM6MDt2Sp___UcmRkV6v5GwzVcHmUk5CZNw4dYlIhtSR8fzRt3l5HzZAn1VIvFYSh4NTUNiwNrHE56gq-n8OwK-mkFPY76yx-95vAN35HaDj9AGzUUHES-4euo2Hwgl-j9TmzFqxZJOffepx7SD6nF5gI5wyb6Oi8b01Y6F8-isVzJq4U-gIVrGzGioj0bYaMQHExWei24qPzEOF6qkdsbo2sUrHPfHmMTVt0p9PV5OLO_HFfluiy5QLAt-J85GAdgMW18_7qt5JQPcEzKEYN-Zutg8KxeBuyyZXhNQVRW8YBEyT5FslTGDg6aaZFGUIBnzKfAhH3xkTgv5AIQ2e1-5ko7l8nquwzgrQ8aGnTYnOE5dnJy2lfkNgJAZYUu0K17QJXLGFthF7RrKj3sfXLf9vBq7rm0UB3uFBTSPwk72XfAMtI5m2F_33zY5mbp3atQsd2am79a1sD5eJRlFhZ3Lb7Ups2DSOI%3D)

Fellow American,

**Have you heard about Rep. Cori Bush?** The extremist member of Congress who said that the 4th of July is only for White Americans.

**Cori Bush** , the extremist member of Congress who vocally advocates for the defunding of police departments across the country, **but recently spent $70,000 of taxpayer money on private security.**

Cori Bush, the extremist member of Congress who implies, daily, that **Republicans are white supremacists hell-bent on suppressing anyone who isn’t a white man from voting**.

**Last week, she threatened my life live on CNN.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=340818a52b894621b18168a84092fc11&_e=AgtlvEJ9hQZyL_HHNh0Ei8GWELKAk--n_9qRHrNNDrzxkxBT_SAH8BYKtLaP-rvooBvpcdZNuekSzBHh0ryriM2NA_ZcWk4zsc3OsFsPKRWjHpi-rwAn4HvzizLwjQhMUWmlQW26famM6MDt2Sp___UcmRkV6v5GwzVcHmUk5CZNw4dYlIhtSR8fzRt3l5HzZAn1VIvFYSh4NTUNiwNrHE56gq-n8OwK-mkFPY76yx-95vAN35HaDj9AGzUUHES-4euo2Hwgl-j9TmzFqxZJOffepx7SD6nF5gI5wyb6Oi8b01Y6F8-isVzJq4U-gIVrGzGioj0bYaMQHExWei24qPzEOF6qkdsbo2sUrHPfHmMTVt0p9PV5OLO_HFfluiy5QLAt-J85GAdgMW18_7qt5BjwndV_4jd-MueK9MYKvjUgsRiz8k31SNpi4NPNN-u01v2FdSVprA1SrcOwv4ph6jIO9kEdaOgvcrwcZqGyuBpDfedkBEzHJw1_CBmc246XNTDUZfgoX980kDCQxnWxZmDXUShqIulptl9-N7obN5Fq1sioPIBr8griSmp-DHkgWZTSBRJoSPTAYkbNfR-oEW486ejy0-aX-IxbdwiU-Y0%3D)
You see, the governor of Missouri issued my wife Patty and I unconditional pardons last week for protecting our St. Louis area home last summer as Black Lives Matter protesters descended upon our property and threatened to burn our home, kill our dog. **Ms. Bush was one of the leaders of this protest, so you might say she has it out for me.**

Well, my pardon didn’t sit well with her. She called me an “ _**absolute liar**_ ,” and informed me on live TV that “ _**my day will come**_.”

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=340818a52b894621b18168a84092fc11&_e=AgtlvEJ9hQZyL_HHNh0Ei8GWELKAk--n_9qRHrNNDrzxkxBT_SAH8BYKtLaP-rvooBvpcdZNuekSzBHh0ryriM2NA_ZcWk4zsc3OsFsPKRWjHpi-rwAn4HvzizLwjQhMUWmlQW26famM6MDt2Sp___UcmRkV6v5GwzVcHmUk5CZNw4dYlIhtSR8fzRt3l5HzZAn1VIvFYSh4NTUNiwNrHE56gq-n8OwK-mkFPY76yx-95vAN35HaDj9AGzUUHES-4euo2Hwgl-j9TmzFqxZJOffepx7SD6nF5gI5wyb6Oi8b01Y6F8-isVzJq4U-gIVrGzGioj0bYaMQHExWei24qPzEOF6qkdsbo2sUrHPfHmMTVt0p9PV5OLO_HFfluiy5QLAt-J85GAdgMW18_7qt5JMByPm9W21t9tv_8yCGZH2CoO90rmeD3BxRTxqDfMza-rwvp5YsF4G7N7uX41PepNJH4YyhWEfxn9xOm7w8F2dCrJie-HzRUDzVlTlXP6DagAUMzaDzJxKpdAP68pScVsWp3Tvqy_YimgUDmm_IqcHDXch8ElxSgniolo2b_46NK_1G5s2RVkuK17Cgxr278NBIpMU0nlD9tI9ZN8vir-s%3D)
**[I’m calling for an investigation into Cori Bush’s threatening statements against me and my family, and I hope you’ll show your support for action to be taken against extremists who think the rules don’t apply to them.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=340818a52b894621b18168a84092fc11&_e=AgtlvEJ9hQZyL_HHNh0Ei8GWELKAk--n_9qRHrNNDrzxkxBT_SAH8BYKtLaP-rvooBvpcdZNuekSzBHh0ryriM2NA_ZcWk4zsc3OsFsPKRWjHpi-rwAn4HvzizLwjQhMUWmlQW26famM6MDt2Sp___UcmRkV6v5GwzVcHmUk5CZNw4dYlIhtSR8fzRt3l5HzZAn1VIvFYSh4NTUNiwNrHE56gq-n8OwK-mkFPY76yx-95vAN35HaDj9AGzUUHES-4euo2Hwgl-j9TmzFqxZJOffepx7SD6nF5gI5wyb6Oi8b01Y6F8-isVzJq4U-gIVrGzGioj0bYaMQHExWei24qPzEOF6qkdsbo2sUrHPfHmMTVt0p9PV5OLO_HFfluiy5QLAt-J85GAdgMW18_7qt5Mitn6jNCViZTkkIS5Ns5UGLuMODE578Cq8C8ffyl076wYusvF89Y7HYrF9F1blFDJ3SrC7m5038CRsMJAtACjNeuYSYaYp6xOSKjeFBSf5CmuByC2i3bKcKAVHtTiID5cfDbBbm2py8PZLM1fbfp_42AIJ2OnhN4xGbVaLe_to-lSAKUswKq5032oJLRFYKa4GYQ260jQz8zl513cTPCEk%3D) **

clean_body: Last week, Rep. Cori Bush threatened me live on CNN. Now, I'm asking you to sign my petition to have her investigated by Congress When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. | Fellow American, Have you heard about Rep. Cori Bush? The extremist member of Congress who said that the 4th of July is only for White Americans. Cori Bush , the extremist member of Congress who vocally advocates for the defunding of police departments across the country, but recently spent $70,000 of taxpayer money on private security. Cori Bush, the extremist member of Congress who implies, daily, that Republicans are white supremacists hell-bent on suppressing anyone who isn’t a white man from voting. Last week, she threatened my life live on CNN. You see, the governor of Missouri issued my wife Patty and I unconditional pardons last week for protecting our St. Louis area home last summer as Black Lives Matter protesters descended upon our property and threatened to burn our home, kill our dog. Ms. Bush was one of the leaders of this protest, so you might say she has it out for me. Well, my pardon didn’t sit well with her. She called me an “ absolute liar ,” and informed me on live TV that “ my day will come.” Cori Bush is a REMARKABLE LIAR. She stood right outside my gate with a megaphone chanting “You can’t stop the revolution.” She is the only one in the United States Congress who has vocally advocated for the overthrow of the United States government. Now that I’m running for Senate and gaining traction, Cori Bush is targeting me. She says we can’t stop the revolution, but . letting me know that you stand with me against the Revolution that Cori Bush and the SQUAD are attempting to start. Mark McCloskey Republican for United States Senate | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. They campaigned extensively in support of President Trump and continue to speak around the nation on their support of the Constitution, the traditional values that have made the USA the greatest nation on earth, and the current threats to its continued existence. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335 Saint Louis, MO 63108 Don't want to receive our emails?

Peter,

Vote-by-mail ballots for California's recall election against failed leftist Governor Gavin Newsom will be mailed to **every registered voter** by August 16th - _just days away._

_**But some counties - including Los Angeles and Fresno - have already mailed out ballots, and votes are being cast right now!**_

We need your help to get the word out and help voters understand that before they can elect a new governor of California, **they must first VOTE YES TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM.**

clean_body: My heart just SANK reviewing the latest FEC reports. Peter -- we don't have time to beat around the bush so let me be straightforward with you: my heart just SANK reviewing the latest FEC reports. Our Republicans are getting outraised 2 to 1 compared to their Democrat challengers. I'm completely shocked. This just threw a big wrench into our plans for winning back the House for President Trump. The race for the Majority is too close to call -- and this news couldn't come at a worse time... I just checked the books and we're over of our mid-quarter fundraising goal. It's tonight. In light of these new reports, hitting our goal was just upgraded from "important" to "required" for our mission to win back the House. Out of everyone, I know you understand what's at stake here, so can I count on you? I'm looking to our most informed and reliable Patriots for help. Your name is at the top of my list. Unfortunately, we don't have another option. Our Conservative allies NEED to catch up to the Democrats or they're TOAST -- we all are! Thank you, Steve Scalise | Republican Whip Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: Nicole Neily
subject: Indoctrinated with lies
body:
The teachers’ unions finally admitted the truth: they want to bring Critical Race Theory to our country’s schools. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c372%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=%2bgYsgnHLjsfJ8bJydf3vzg&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65915%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lmjI2jBtpdAyFH0kvzVbsA&sysid=1) Fellow American, _The teachers’ unions finally admitted the truth: they want to bring Critical Race Theory to our country’s schools._ Critical Race Theory divides students by race and pits them against each other as either “oppressors” or “oppressed,” indoctrinating kids with fake anti-American history, radicalism, and even engaging in _actual discrimination_ against some students. This radically destructive agenda is derived from Marxist Critical Theory that aims to undermine western free-market democracy and push the country in an extreme direction. **Like you, I have unapologetically opposed Critical Race Theory, and I won’t stop now -- not when the future of our nation and the educational opportunities of our kids relies on us.** [**Whether you’re a parent, grandparent, or concerned community member, I need your immediate signature on the National Petition to Stop Critical Race Theory in Schools, which I’ll use to show legislators on Capitol Hill, the Department of Education, the media, radical teachers’ associations, and “woke” school districts what Americans _really_ think.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65916%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Bfz9aX4vr8Lxm41S3COR7A&sysid=1) [**Sign today: I want Critical Race Theory out of schools**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65917%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=69EHXw%2f1qxf4upTkw%2fa%2brg&sysid=1) While Parents Defending Education and concerned parents, grandparents, and community members like you want to keep this toxic ideology out of our classrooms, the largest teacher unions in the country are promoting this political indoctrination! The American Federation of Teachers (AFT) has vowed to defend members who are punished for teaching Critical Race Theory in defiance of a growing number of states that have passed legislation removing it from their schools’ curriculums. AFT’s president has even stated the union is preparing litigation. **_Well, Parents Defending Education would love to meet the AFT in court._** I welcome the challenge to defend healthy, non-political education for all students. I want better for my kids and yours, and I want our students prepared to compete in the global economy. [**To stand against Critical Race Theory and the extreme agenda of teachers’ unions like AFT, please sign the national petition today.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65918%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wzw2Oa9gG82Li%2b8y%2bn73Bw&sysid=1) I know that our efforts are already effective, Fellow American, because we’ve gotten the attention of the teachers’ unions. The National Education Association (NEA), the largest in the country, just passed a resolution at its annual conference to allocate more than $50,000 to “research” --_translation: investigate and smear_ -- groups like Parents Defending Education! Just like the AFT, the NEA has decided they’re “all in” for Critical Race Theory, which means they’re prepared to attack those who threaten their agenda the most. But their first line of defense is even more maddening for parents like you and me. The AFT and the NEA have _claimed_ that Critical Race Theory isn’t actually being taught in schools and that it’s a “fake crisis” invented by paranoid parents. Meanwhile, the AFT has tweeted public statements in support of Critical Race Theory and has said they’re preparing legal action ... while the NEA just passed a resolution to support the spread of Critical Race Theory to every classroom - and then removed the resolution from their website after it was exposed! **[You don’t have to be a parent to know what the AFT, NEA, and other radicals are doing to our country and our children is wrong. That’s why I need you to sign this national petition and stand up against this toxic, politicized “education”-- and restore a healthy, non-political environment for our kids.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65919%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UkxxSk5aHzWryxMKHoRQ7A&sysid=1)
** **Only together will we defeat the Goliath enemy we face. ** Thank you for your support! Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education 4532 Lee Hwy #119
Arlington VA 22207
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c372%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=%2bgYsgnHLjsfJ8bJydf3vzg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c372%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=%2bgYsgnHLjsfJ8bJydf3vzg&sysid=1)

| | Peter, Tish James is EXACTLY the person we need to be New York's next Governor. **The Financial Times: Letitia James, the New York attorney-general fighting for the state's underdogs** Not only is Tish James a bold progressive leader, she has the rare experience of taking on the biggest fights in politics \-- like investigating Donald Trump and his crimes. So as New York looks to replace Andrew Cuomo and restore decency and integrity to that once great office, Tish James is exactly the right person for the job. That's why When Democrats Turn Out has established our Run Tish Fund to show Tish James that there is a nationwide movement of grassroots supporters begging her to run for governor. Like many of you, we see Tish James' potential to not only accomplish a great deal for the state of New York but also inspire other Democrats. She has already sent the message to Trump's acolytes that she won't tolerate leaders who lack integrity or a commitment to justice. Just imagine what she could do as governor. The problem is that there is an entire political machine supporting Andrew Cuomo that wants a hand-picked replacement to come in and squash any investigation or criminal charges related to his sexual harassment and workplace abuse. That can't happen. Unless we stand up to Cuomo, we will be sending the message to Trump and every other Republican that our disgust at their own criminal behavior is just politics. This isn't about politics. This is about truth, justice, and integrity. **[That's why we're setting a modest yet achievable goal of raising $1,500 to help support candidates like Tish James who will fight to restore justice instead of maintaining politics as usual. subject: Big Non-Endorsement in Recall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Governor 2021 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [30 Momentous Days](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioosn-kR4X1O3M9ezD6n2Da7NETXwB7YQT17v_DjM7-V1w&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_14&n=1) The LA Times is urging readers to vote against me because I “remind” them of Ron DeSantis and Tom Cotton. I’ll happily accept that non-endorsement. You’ll be shocked to learn the Times also urged a No vote on the Recall. An honest editorial might have begun like this: “Every step of the way, Newsom opted for maximum state control: lockdowns, schools, masks, the vaccine. Where’s the evidence it’s done us a whit of good?” Of course, we knew the media would be against us. Every force has been arrayed against us from the start: special interests that hand Newsom huge checks, tech companies that mute opposition, a political class that cheats in plain sight. But our movement was formed from something they can’t touch: the solitary man or woman, sitting at a table, holding out a pen and paper to neighbors. The hero of this story is the California citizen. In your community, you are beyond the reach of censors. You are incorruptible. Your words and deeds have been true and pure: aimed at nothing more than a better future for us all. Signature by signature, you built a citizens’ movement the likes of which California has never seen. It’s because of you – not any politician or political party – that we have this golden opportunity. And now, we have 30 momentous days to seize it. By spreading the word. By talking to everyone we know. By reaching out to that fickle friend or apathetic acquaintance with a simple plea: take a chance on change. At this moment, everything is up for grabs. Let’s fight until the end, leave it all on the field, and witness a new birth of freedom for the State of California. [Help get our new commercial to as many voters as possible](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7PyukeanaPVVByy4cGnphLXxOEH1CWIcHtuMj2-9EAmrlzX4&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_14&n=2) [Share this post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAzQoHlNRbPdsr9eCStnkEOy46Eo07bHCAFgHzzyYEhEhA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_14&n=3) Kevin Kiley
[KileyForCalifornia.com](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_14&n=4)
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Governor 2021 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_14&n=5).

name: Chief James Craig
subject: disgusting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132481:67wN15lNP:m:1:3253819041:91AC4794CADCA3E9AB319B098033D19F:r) | |
---
Peter,

**What is the Left 's response to our concerns about rising crime in the wake of the Defund the Police movement?**

__**Tell us to "suck it up."**__

I'm not exaggerating. That is a DIRECT quote from Rep. Cori Bush, one of the most outspoken advocates of defunding the police.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132481:67wN15lNP:m:1:3253819041:91AC4794CADCA3E9AB319B098033D19F:r)

It's shameful. It's just another example of the "rules for thee and not for me" politicians across this country.

**My name is Chief James Craig, and I am the former Detroit Chief of Police. Not only do I reject the call to "Defund the Police," I believe we have a public safety crisis in America - and it's time we gave the police even MORE support.**

We all deserve to feel safe in our communities - not just those who can afford their own private security.

Peter, it's past time that our leaders started taking our public safety crisis seriously. I believe it's time to act.

And it's part of why the Michigan governor's race is attracting national attention: because I'm a veteran police chief who is unafraid to stand up to the elites when it comes to our police.

I couldn't be more touched by what Tucker had to say about my time leading the Detroit Police Department through the unrest of 2020:

_" When the crisis came, you rose to it. And your city didn't burn... when it came down to it, you kept it safe. And I think that really matters." _

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132481:67wN15lNP:m:1:3253819041:91AC4794CADCA3E9AB319B098033D19F:r)

My 40+ years serving as a police officer taught me a lot about leadership - and a lot about the importance of law and order.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132481:67wN15lNP:m:1:3253819041:91AC4794CADCA3E9AB319B098033D19F:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

Leadership - real leadership - matters.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**That 's why I opened an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead from the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of that team.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132481:67wN15lNP:m:1:3253819041:91AC4794CADCA3E9AB319B098033D19F:r)**
[**LEAD FROM THE FRONT WITH CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132481:67wN15lNP:m:1:3253819041:91AC4794CADCA3E9AB319B098033D19F:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

**And I've already told you MY position on "Defund the Police!"**

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132481:67wN15lNP:m:1:3253819041:91AC4794CADCA3E9AB319B098033D19F:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132482:67wN15lNP:m:1:3253819041:91AC4794CADCA3E9AB319B098033D19F:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132483:67wN15lNP:m:1:3253819041:91AC4794CADCA3E9AB319B098033D19F:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132484:67wN15lNP:m:1:3253819041:91AC4794CADCA3E9AB319B098033D19F:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132485:67wN15lNP:m:1:3253819041:91AC4794CADCA3E9AB319B098033D19F:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132481:67wN15lNP:m:1:3253819041:91AC4794CADCA3E9AB319B098033D19F:r)

Chief James Craig

Former Detroit Police Chief

_P.S. I 'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: **[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-171745](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132481:67wN15lNP:m:1:3253819041:91AC4794CADCA3E9AB319B098033D19F:r)**_

| | Hey Derek, it’s Terry.

I hate to email you on a Saturday, but I just needed to make sure you know where we stand.

The thing is, we’ve got just over one day until our mid-month deadline, and we still need to raise $72,620 before midnight tomorrow.

**I’m doing everything I can to scrape together enough contributions to hit this goal, and you’re one of my top supporters, so I know I can count on you. Will you chip in just $15 or $25 to my campaign right now to help me meet this goal?**

You can use this personalized link to contribute whatever amount makes sense for you today >> **_[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/trm_2021_em?refcode=20210814.10_TM_8BI](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34068923/300817841/-2023814932?refcode=20210814.10_TM_8BI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTc3NmNhMi01N2ZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g_8g89X88_ajgGa7zttVs34uDoyC6B4qMlZ-mVdV07I=)_**

I’m counting on you, Derek. **_[Chip in any amount right now to help power this campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34068924/300817842/-2023814932?refcode=20210814.10_TM_8BI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTc3NmNhMi01N2ZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g_8g89X88_ajgGa7zttVs34uDoyC6B4qMlZ-mVdV07I=)_**

name: Team Fetterman
subject: The big 5-2
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We’re planning a BIG surprise.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210814-2287-header&t=1&akid=2287%2E434096%2EeVtV93)
Hi, Peter!
We’re planning a BIG surprise for John Fetterman’s 52nd birthday tomorrow.
Thousands of supporters have already signed John’s Official Birthday Card and jotted down personal birthday messages for him to read.
But according to our records, you *still* haven't signed the birthday card.
**We’re showing the card to John and his family first thing tomorrow morning, so this is your last chance to be part of the birthday celebration!**
[**_Will you sign John Fetterman’s Official Birthday Card right now? We can’t wait to see the look on his face tomorrow when he sees your name at the top of the card._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/happy-bday-john-2021?source=em20210814-2&t=2&akid=2287%2E434096%2EeVtV93)

Peter,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2601a7bc272545aba4ac26f7486801d1&_e=2np0c6PuxNXpFUavM0YWu_oGAw3QXdX74e0s32W8cR518qIZzKpfATTUZewxIbziAWZ7as9y2UvaHT_4c-D9HAItefnNm_3KLIxJk0gfCOpm0s2o8zw5y0nFbj-Nnwzmi6Sh5Dj3QSJacFqPME7QDpDyELjqLApERCxKUKZOC19wg9XZkCkYznKBx5wZYZ0G7uy9aWSNDn_m9TU3xZ7WT_LcGWrFYYNEI6T1j7rsJPDBirQJDpRJRBYtCnlCkA2r_hUkG9-P0irRmaU9gxA92T8sNK5CZKFTHmOflWCrUoEMe5m473Yv8nepNH2wmzr01lJ7-SlMtExI9Ha-bbDcwlNSlwlK5FPa2rb0uVqEAyXJyMy_6QKe-dR7rmUcgIHhoXSYzvu8sRpicHeUy2K8W4eVis4uZxBcRJbQFeZgYIyy6n_u43Z5Qhu54KNFvFaiWH_6nlK35qaG9fUpnzq5ULAjRwR0gb9WUM2SNL72t5WZlro0Q4OIIXAgSWYZrNQy9qf_yit1y-b64npPhlSj3w%3D%3D)**

One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it’s anyone’s guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn’t be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate.

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

Friend, We're about to launch our Official Trump Cards, which will be reserved for President Trump's STRONGEST supporters, and we have some very exciting news to share with you. We recently met with the President in his Florida office and showed him four designs. Originally we were planning on releasing just one design, but when President Trump saw the cards on his desk, he said, “These are BEAUTIFUL. We should let the American People decide - they ALWAYS know best!” So, Friend, what do you think? We're counting ALL responses until 11:59 PM TONIGHT. Please cast your vote below for our brand new Official Trump Card. President Trump always values your input, and he has made it clear that YOUR voice is the ONLY one that matters. We're updating the President the results first thing TOMORROW morning, and we know he's going to ask which card you voted for. Don't let him down. Please vote for your favorite Trump Card by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to make sure President Trump sees your vote. body:

[START THE SURVEY NOW >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-YTZdq-)

We won't sugarcoat it: **We 're facing a tough road ahead to protect our House Majority.**

But we know a thing or two about winning uphill battles -- because in 2O2O, we:

\-- **DEFEATED** Donald Trump,
\-- **FLIPPED** the Senate,
\-- and **HELD** the House!

None of that would have been possible without feedback from grassroots Democrats just like you guiding our winning strategy.

But now we need your help again, so will you take just 3O seconds to complete our August Priorities Survey?****

Democratic HQ

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. | | Hi Peter,

Some of them, you knew were rotten.

Some, are new to the list of the RINO traitors in the Senate.

Together, they helped pass a pork-laden $1.2 trillion bill, that is loaded down with bad Socialist policy that our grandchildren will pay for- and will cause inflation today.

Are you angry yet? [That's where we come in.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=9810962e65&e=ba6e67b849)

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots supporting Trump and actually FIGHTING Biden and the radical Left- not helping Biden pass his agenda.

Have you heard of the betrayal this week? 19 Republican Senators (including lots from safe seats) joined with the Dems to pass a HUGE infrastructure bill. This is one of Biden's biggest policy objectives, and as usual, there is more here than it seems.

_Hidden in its 2702 pages are plans to implement a pilot program to track your vehicle miles for a new highway tax. The proposed plan will also enable the US government to track where you’ve been and your favorite hangouts.

Trump ripped Mitch McConnell on Tuesday over his support for the infrastructure bill.

Trump called McConnell “the most overrated man in politics.”

Trump ended by saying McConnell is working “hard to give Biden a victory” — and warned they are going for “the biggest tax increases in history” next._

As usual, President Trump is right. This is a boondoggle, filled with new taxes like a per-mile driving tax, kneecapping crypto-currency, and more. 2,700 pages of pork and Dem objectives and it was only made possible by weak Republicans.

Remember this when someone tells you a "bad Republican is better than a good Democrat". They are not.

I’m sick & tired of moderate/RINO one-way loyalty! RICHARD SHELBY actually back-stabbed our Conservative candidate for a damn Socialist Abortion supporter in 2018! But these (R)INO scumbags seek to enable the Socialist Agenda & ruin America!

[Will you help us defeat these traitor RINOs?](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=61ad6b9132&e=ba6e67b849)

**We cannot trust the Republicans in the Senate to do the right thing- many of them, anyway. We need to primary the worst offenders and remove them from office- it's the only way to whip the rest into line. **

The Dems don't have this problem. They all fall in line when time comes. They all voted against all of Trump's nominees, every one. We are sending the wrong people to DC.

We have been sending choir boys- but we need more America First fighters!

[Help us make an example](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=86eee6b54a&e=ba6e67b849) of the RINOs by defeating them in primaries. _Trump is still fighting the Dems, and America needs us to join the battle!_
